Lore Item

AC: 12
DEX: +13
SV DISEASE: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: LARGE

Average Price: 2,000pp Pricing Data...

[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Nagafen's Lair
NPC Name
a guano harvester


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Nagafen's Lair


Uploaded March 30th, 2019 by Drewinette
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Got from Butcherblock
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2005 at 11:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594571019456
12 posts
Heya all this is also the result of a quest in Butcherblock was just sitting there on my 36 Ranger when I heard a halfling female ask if anyone would help her I put up tracking and went to her, and said I can help you. She then started talking about she needed her shovel back from a Mudd monster that stole it while she was digging. I went through all the story and told her to show me where this monster was. She led me a little ways past the Wayfarer's camp and sure enough a huge mud monster was there holding a shovel no doubt was spawned by the halfling, looked just like a Mage Earth pet hehe. Anyway I tried to root it was immune so went to attacking he hit Really weak like 10 - 15 at most with 850 ac BUT he had an insane DS like 35 - 50 or so I finally killed him and he dropped this cloak, a neck item 7 ac, 10 fr no big and the shovel. When I handed the shovel back to her she gave me 150p and a Ruby which sells for 120p in shops So I was very happy about this. FYI with 1400 hp he took me to 2% before I killed him this is Only because I stopped attacking and healed myself a bit. Dunno if this is a triggered event but I will say it was really cool =)

64 Monk, Human Stromm
44 Druid, Half Elf Stromm
36 Ranger, Half Elf Stromm

Price
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2004 at 12:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363340327
View User Forum
Scholar
297 posts
Someone sold this on Tribunal for 1K. I wanted it, but someone else beat me to it. :( Is 1K a reasonable price -- that is to say, might I expect to see this price in future? I've only ever seen this one, so I'm not sure if that's a normal price. (After this one sold, someone /ooced that they wanted to sell one for 20K, which just shocked me...I hope that was too high.)
▲ Page top
er...
QuoteReply
# May 11 2003 at 11:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257127264
39 posts
you realize that Guano Harvester isn't so much of a name, right? This is like a janitor for the bats (guano is bat crap)
▲ Page top
FYI...
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 12:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362237818
24 posts
Guano Harvester is a semi-rare spawn...I've seen him twice in a couple dozen visits, and got the 'Guano Harvester casting message' a couple other times. He immediately invis's himself, and almost always spawns in the 2nd bat room (take a right from Bat 1) after you go underneath the rock chomper.

He goes down in about 4 hits, and I've only seen him drop the 100% weight reduc bag. Unlike some people have rumored, he drops loot no matter what lvl you are, you don't have to get a lvl 24 or lower to kill him. That's absurd.

-TerreFeu
54th Cavalier on Saryrn
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 08 2003 at 8:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if you will notice moron, the person saying you have to be level 24 or lower was on the firiona vie server. perhaps you should keep your mouth shut if you arent going to bother reading the entire post. k tks, die irl.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 04 2002 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HAHA i gave 1k for this thing in bazaar so all this 15k stuff lol it dont sell for that any more 3k max low 1k so thats all i got to say . go to bazaar and look it up)
uhh
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2002 at 4:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966263870
1 post
i got one of these tonight and i was the lowest in the group (39) so being green has nothing to do with it

on the FV server
▲ Page top
Great Cloak
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 10:34 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248734557
73 posts
Well I finnaly won a roll and got this baby right here last night. I was 43 at the time and the cloak replaced my fine plate cloak I had. I'm happy.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 22 2002 at 12:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pointless test.. but nice cloak =)
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 25 2002 at 4:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i'm a 53 monk. killed guano more times than i can count while soloing bats. finally got a cloak after letting tons of bags rot. anyone interested in buying it look up Izac on karana server. since i got i was lucky enough to get something better yet. so if interested gimme a shout
Trivial looting on FV
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361890709
6 posts
Just did it an hour ago, he spawned, we had a 24 druid come in and cleared a path. We brought him down to an empty circle room and rooted him. She nuked him til he died. He was light blue to her at 24, so level is more like 17 tops. He dropped the bag.

Moral, on FV if you see him, clear a path and get a 24 or lower to come in for him or he won't drop you a thing.

Throndain Oakenbones
Dwarven Warrior
Firiona Vie
▲ Page top
RE: Trivial looting on FV
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2004 at 5:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248645137
53 posts
pretty unneccessary. the bag is not magical and drops on FV. Happened yesterday.

And TLC DOE work. it makes thing so much of a hassle, that you need to be REAL high, in order to make it work. the its usually not worth the effort

▲ Page top

# Oct 08 2001 at 3:10 AM Rating: Decent

Scholar
229 posts
I am thinking this cloak will be extremely rare on the FV server. Guano harvester will be green to anyone hunting the bat caves in SolB, so with the TLC it wont drop if they kill him.

"/shout we have guano harvester mezzed, any chars under level 35 here who can help us kill him?"

So much for encouraging roleplay...

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 08 2002 at 2:18 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think the FV server is kinda gay...mainly because it isn't a PvP server.
OMG
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 6:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757993803
2 posts
This cloak ROCKS! 12ac with no weight!......and +13 dex......OMG. My rogue and monk are going to love me for these. Needless to say, I'm on the case.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 19 2001 at 10:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who cares about DEX! This is the perfect cloak for monks cause it is weightless and has 12ac!
RE: Dex is Nothing
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 1:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758074317
63 posts
just to second Nyshraak's comment. dex is a great stat to have points in, for a ranger that is. of course this is for the people that play rangers as a ranger, the stat mods are more important than AC (ac is not always god) i wear the 6 str/dex rings for that reason instead of the 6ac 65hp ones. the dex on this cloak is great and the only cloak i would wear instead of this one is a tigeraptor cloak (more stat mods). that's excluding dragon drops, like the CoF, but i really don't need to say that, it's common sense

Dartaniun Eagleeye
50 Ranger of Torvon
▲ Page top
RE: Dex is Nothing
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757431951
70 posts
You, my friend, are not a very smart monk... Dex determines how many times your weapons proc (which is good, since a lot of the higher end monk staves have effects) and how fast your battle skills go up... I dunno about you, but *I* sure don't wanna be caught in a Sodomite zone with an FD skill of 10...
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 25 2001 at 4:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Prices
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 7:42 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just have to laugh at the people going 'Funny, it's worth 15k, but nobody will buy it from me'.

Did it occur to you that perhaps, it's _not_ worth 15k? Just cause something is marked with a price here doesn't mean that's what people will really pay. Ask around, you may find the price has dropped and you're asking 5k more than anyone would consider paying. Or you may be at the correct price. But finding nobody willing to buy it would give me a hint I may be asking too much.
▲ Page top
RE: Prices
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2001 at 12:16 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Absolutely right. Also, if you click the "Pricing Info" link next to each item's price, you can see who's decided to "adjust" the prices based on their opinion. Look at the amounts and dates of each, you'll get a fell for the correct price.
▲ Page top
RE: Prices
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 7:43 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Or even to the fact that people who would consider buying it would rather go kill for the item and take the chances on the roll than shell out the dough...
▲ Page top
Weird...
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 3:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got this cloak yesterday (June 27)... it was really weird. I was just sitting around the bugs group, just sorta waiting for someone to leave so I could get into the group, when I heard a weird sound... and it was the guano harvester making those goblin sounds it makes. It was just standing there in the hallway, while the group was fighting. Naturally, I got up and nuked the bad-boy. Dropped this cloak... didn't have to roll, since I killed him by myself, but I was actually hoping for the bag.. =( Oh well.
▲ Page top
Cloak of shadows
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 4:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249473517
2 posts
This cloak is really cool, I just got it a couple days ago on the Torvonnilous server. Won a roll on it and didn't know what it was till my group told me about it. Nice stats but people seem reluctant to buy it. The only ones that seem to be interested are the people who cant even come close to affording it. Ah well. If anyone is interested in buying it from me or trading, im looking for paw of opolla and/or GEB's + pp or some variation thereof.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 3:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WoW! i won roll on this while i was camping bnb in solb. Not sure what happened.. all of a sudden a group mate of mine was going crazy, screaming and yealing that this thing dropped. not sure what it was. rolled for the hell of it and won! not till the person who went crazy msged me and told me how ULTRA RARE this is. i've heard there is only around 200 on my server. Im SELLING this amazing item on trov server. i need gebs bad so im only sellnig for 10k obo or gebs & 5k. Please send Clemsia or Genozide a tell around 5pm - 5am eastern time. thanks!
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 4:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) cloak dropped 6/1/01 on nameless... am trying to sell but no one wants to part with 16kp to have the best dex cloak in game hehe.... if ya see this and want cloak gimmie a tell in game... Drizlin or Adamantite.
twinks!

# May 21 2001 at 2:37 PM Rating: Default

Found Guano while doing Bugs/Bats in Sol B, (for the 2nd time), killed him and won the roll on this cloak. Avg price on Mor-Thu was last quoted 12-15k pp. Wearing it now, fantastic cloak. Don't think I wanna sell this now. Date of acquisition; May 18th, 2001.

# May 20 2001 at 12:34 PM Rating: Default

It still Drops in SolB This is the problem with it
Guano Harvester is a RANDOM spawn and he's invisible when he pops. So unless you have track it's hard to get this guy. He also drops some kinda weight reducing bag not a very good one tho.

actually.. its a wonderful bag.. 100% weight reduction.. you just can't beat it :)

5 posts
100% WR is great, only problem is that the bag only holds small items. It's great for a chanter who wants to carry stacks and stacks of metal for jewelcraft tho. Why they call it a "large" soiled bag it beyond me. Very deceptive.
